label: Agility
description: "The physical capacity for swift, nimble, and graceful movement, allowing the creature to easily evade threats, navigate hazardous terrain, or strike with exceptional speed."

label: Compassion
description: "The capacity for mercy and restraint toward the vulnerable; the creature spares those it has overcome, releases captives, and refrains from harming the weak."

label: Treasure hoarding
description: "The behavioral tendency to collect and guard valuable objects such as gold or precious stones."

label: Archery
description: "Exceptional skill with a bow and arrow."

label: Blindness
description: "The condition of impaired or absent sight, whether innate, induced, or afflicting the creature; the inability to see, sometimes overcome by remedies or compensated by other senses."

label: Courage
description: "A behavioral disposition toward fearlessness and boldness in the face of danger, often attributed symbolically rather than as a physical trait."

label: Dance
description: "Rhythmic movement attributed to the creature, often in mythological or allegorical contexts."

label: Deadly scream
description: "A vocalization so powerful it causes death or severe harm to those who hear it."

label: Fire breathing
description: "The ability to exhale fire or intense heat, capable of burning living beings and objects."

label: Fertility
description: "The biological or symbolic power to generate abundant life, ensure reproductive success, or bring vitality and growth to the surrounding environment, often associated with natural or divine blessings."

label: Flight
description: "The capacity to move through the air using wings or other supernatural means."

label: Healing
description: "The ability to treat wounds and diseases through knowledge of herbs plants and natural remedies."

label: Healing tears
description: "The unique medicinal property attributed to the secretions or lacrimal fluids of a creature, possessing the power to mend wounds, cure afflictions, or restore vitality to those they touch, often highlighting the creature's paradoxical nature as a source of both danger and salvation."

label: Hypnotic gaze
description: "The capacity to exert control over the will, perceptions, or motor functions of another through direct visual contact; it induces a state of trance, paralysis, or psychological subjugation that renders the subject vulnerable to the creature's intent."

label: Intellect
description: "The advanced cognitive capacity for abstract reasoning, problem-solving, strategic planning, or the acquisition of deep knowledge."

label: Immortality
description: "The creature does not die of natural causes and may be immune to conventional means of harm."

label: Killing gaze
description: "The ability to cause instant death through direct eye contact, distinct from petrification."

label: Lethal breath
description: "Exhalation capable of killing living beings, scorching vegetation, and breaking stones."

label: Lethal hiss
description: "A hissing sound capable of causing death or severe harm."

label: Lethal odor
description: "A smell so toxic it kills serpents and other creatures in proximity."

label: Magic
description: "The inherent power to manipulate reality, cast enchantments, or manifest supernatural phenomena through occult or supernatural means, transcending ordinary physical laws."

label: Magical powers
description: "A general capacity to perform supernatural acts beyond the laws of nature, including enchantments, transformations, or other arcane feats."

label: Magical song
description: "The capacity to produce vocal melodies or auditory frequencies embedded with supernatural influence, capable of enchanting minds, manipulating emotions, or altering the physical environment of those who hear it."

label: Manipulation
description: "The deceptive or tactical capacity to influence, control, or exploit the behaviors, minds, or situations of others, often reflecting symbolic associations with cunning, betrayal, or malice."

label: Petrifying gaze
description: "The ability to turn living beings to stone through direct eye contact."

label: Plague Spreading
description: "The hazardous capacity or biological disposition to generate, harbor, and transmit deadly pestilence or infectious diseases, acting as an agent of widespread physical decay or divine judgment."

label: Play foot castanet
description: "A highly specific behavioral or anatomical skill where the creature produces rhythmic, clicking sounds using its feet or hooves, typically utilized for communication, distraction, or ritualistic displays."

label: Play the flute
description: "The ability to play a musical instrument, attributed symbolically or as a marker of the creature's connection to music and nature."

label: Venomous
description: "The creature produces or secretes a toxic substance capable of harming or killing through bite, touch, or breath."

label: Posing Riddles
description: "The intellectual capacity to challenge others through cryptic questions or complex linguistic puzzles; it functions as a test of wisdom or a mechanism for defense, requiring the interlocutor to provide a specific solution to avoid misfortune."

label: Water purification
description: "The ability to cleanse or sanctify bodies of water through presence or touch."

label: Rebirth from fire
description: "The cyclical supernatural capacity to undergo complete physical destruction by fire only to emerge fully restored and rejuvenated from its own ashes, epitomizing ultimate renewal, resilience, and spiritual resurrection."

label: Regenerate lost limbs
description: "The exceptional biological capacity to organically regrow, mend, or completely replace severed body parts or heavily damaged tissue, rendering the creature remarkably resilient against permanent physical trauma."

label: Resolution
description: "Firmness of will and steadfast determination; the creature's resolute, unyielding disposition, located by the bestiaries in the head as the seat of its resolve."

label: Self-destruction
description: "The creature is driven to destroy itself due to its internally contradictory nature, whether physiological, psychological, or ontological."

label: Self-renewal
description: "The capacity to regenerate, rejuvenate, or be reborn, often cyclically."

label: Shape shifting
description: "he inherent biological or magical fluidity allowing a creature to alter its physical appearance, form, or species identity, effectively blurring the lines of its original manifestation to deceive, escape, or adapt to different environments."

label: Singing
description: "The ability to produce melodious vocalizations, often with enchanting or symbolic effects on listeners."

label: Skin Shedding
description: "The periodic sloughing of the outer skin to renew the body, by which the creature casts off its old self and regains its youth, as the snake squeezes through a narrow crack to shed its skin."

label: Soporific
description: "The specialized power or chemical/auditory trait to induce deep, unnatural sleep or profound lethargy in other beings, leaving them incapacitated and vulnerable to the creature's intent."

label: Speak Black Speech
description: "The capacity to speak the dark tongue of evil or infernal beings; articulate speech in a malign or forbidden language."

label: Speech
description: "The advanced intellectual and physiological capacity to articulate spoken language, enabling the creature to communicate complex thoughts, negotiate, deceive, or impart hidden wisdom to humans."

label: Speed
description: "Exceptional swiftness of movement on land, in water, or in the air."

label: Strength
description: "Exceptional physical power, allowing the creature to overpower prey or enemies through brute force."

label: Sunlight Petrification
description: "The power, or vulnerability, by which exposure to sunlight turns a creature to stone; petrifaction induced by daylight."

label: Swimming
description: "The ability to move efficiently through water."

label: Swim in the air
description: "The capacity to move through the air as though swimming through water, flying in constant, fluid motion without the aid of wings."

label: Trumpet Voice
description: "The physical capacity to emit an exceptionally loud, resonant, and piercing vocalization resembling a brass instrument, used to signal danger, terrify enemies, or assert dominance over a vast territory."

label: Untameable
description: "The absolute behavioral resistance to subjugation, domestication, or human control; it reflects an unyielding nature and an innate commitment to wild autonomy that defies all efforts of mastery."

label: Venomous
description: "The biological trait of producing and delivering toxic secretions through bites, stings, or skin contact, capable of inflicting severe illness, paralysis, or agonizing death upon adversaries."

label: Weather Control
description: "The majestic supernatural capacity to summon, alter, or pacify atmospheric conditions, allowing the creature to command storms, winds, rain, or lightning to shape its immediate environment."

label: Wine Drinking
description: "An exceptional or culturally distinctive relationship with wine consumption, often associated with loss of rational control, festivity, or ritual behavior."
